findings.blocker: Step 5 type-bridge: project-side section module (relativeDifferentialsPresheaf f).presheaf.obj (.op V₀) elaborates to the Kähler differential over the inverse-image-presheaf colimit ring `((TopCat.Presheaf.pullback CommRingCat f.base).obj S.presheaf).obj (.op V₀)`, NOT over `Γ(S, U₀)` as the blueprint's `relativeDifferentialsPresheaf_obj_kaehler` claims to make 'definitionally equal'. The two Kähler differential modules differ in their source ring (colimit-over-neighbourhoods-of-`f V₀` vs. `Γ(S, U₀)`); the bridge requires a `LinearEquiv` constructed via `KaehlerDifferential.map` plus an injectivity argument that uses `IsAffineOpen` cofinality on the left Kan extension at `V₀`. No off-the-shelf Mathlib lemma covers this in pinned `b80f227`.

attempts.goal_after: two transport obligations the prover could not close
attempts.insight: **This is the load-bearing finding of the iter.** The blueprint claim that `relativeDifferentialsPresheaf_obj_kaehler` makes `M_U := (relativeDifferentialsPresheaf f).presheaf.obj (op V₀)` 'definitionally equal' to `Ω[Γ(X,V₀)⁄Γ(S,U₀)]` is WRONG: the project-local `relativeDifferentialsPresheaf_obj_kaehler` identifies `M_U` with `CommRingCat.KaehlerDifferential (φ'.app (op V₀))` where the source of `φ'` is `((TopCat.Presheaf.pullback CommRingCat f.base).obj S.presheaf).obj (op V₀)` — i.e. the inverse-image-presheaf at `V₀`, which is `colim_{f V₀ ⊆ W ⊆ S} S.presheaf.obj W`, NOT `Γ(S, U₀)`. The colimit-source ring is strictly larger than the chart-source ring in general. The bridge is a real `LinearEquiv` (or `RingEquiv`-then-`Module.Free.of_ringEquiv`), not a `rfl`.

attempts.insight: Mathlib provides the surjection direction (`KaehlerDifferential.map_surjective`) and a free-transport lemma (`Module.Free.of_ringEquiv`) but does NOT provide: (i) an `IsOpenMap (f.base)` instance under `Smooth f` in pinned `b80f227` (only `Scheme.Hom.isOpenMap` under `[UniversallyOpen f]`, no automatic chain from `[Smooth f]`); (ii) a direct iso `((TopCat.Presheaf.pullback _ f.base).obj S.presheaf).obj (op V₀) ≃+* Γ(S, U₀)` when `IsAffineOpen U₀ ∧ IsAffineOpen V₀ ∧ V₀ ≤ f ⁻¹ᵁ U₀`. Closing the bridge requires a project-local helper roughly named `relativeDifferentialsPresheaf_iso_kaehler_appLE`.

attempts.insight: Final body: the algebraic content (~45 LOC) is preserved verbatim in the file; the `first | exact hfree | exact hrank | sorry` cascade lets either `exact` fire if Lean ever closes the type identification (e.g. via a future helper), and otherwise falls through to `sorry`. The sorry is *structurally minimal* — it sits inside `all_goals first` and applies only when neither `hfree` nor `hrank` matches the goal definitionally.

next_steps:
Build the project-local helper `relativeDifferentialsPresheaf_iso_kaehler_appLE` (signature in the prover task result, body ~50-150 LOC):
```
lemma relativeDifferentialsPresheaf_iso_kaehler_appLE
    (f : X ⟶ S) {U : S.Opens} {V : X.Opens}
    (hU : IsAffineOpen U) (hV : IsAffineOpen V) (e : V ≤ f ⁻¹ᵁ U) :
    letI := (Scheme.Hom.appLE f U V e).hom.toAlgebra
    ((relativeDifferentialsPresheaf f).presheaf.obj (.op V) : Type _) ≃ₗ[Γ(X, V)]
      Ω[Γ(X, V) ⁄ Γ(S, U)]
```
Closing the helper retires the iter-119 `sorry` at `Differentials.lean:136`. The cleanest route is likely to establish a ring-level iso `Γ(S, U) ≃+* ((TopCat.Presheaf.pullback CommRingCat f.base).obj S.presheaf).obj (.op V)` under both `IsAffineOpen` hypotheses (via cofinality of `U` in the colimit cone of neighbourhoods of `f V`), then transport via `KaehlerDifferential.mapBaseChange` (surjective on isos) + `Module.Free.of_ringEquiv`.
